comingSoon.title: Our story is just beginning...
comingSoon.subtitle: Mythoria is crafting something magical! I'm working hard, alongside AI, to bring you a new world of personalized storytelling. Stay tuned, the adventure will be available soon! 🧙‍♂️📚✨

kids.title: Kids
kids.description: Turn your child, grandchild, nephew, or niece into the hero of their own magical adventure!

groups.title: Groups & Yearbooks
groups.description: Immortalize your team spirit and your group's memories!

adults.title: Adults
adults.description: Relive your love story or a once-in-a-lifetime trip as a stunning illustrated memoir.

companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Gift customers or staff families a branded, personalised storybook that keeps your logo on the bookshelf.

whatDrivesUs.title: What drives us?
whatDrivesUs.paragraph1: We believe that inside every person is a special story, just waiting for a chance to shine. Our dream is simple: to see a child's eyes light up reading a book they helped create, or to see an adult smile, rediscovering that spark of imagination.
whatDrivesUs.paragraph2: Mythoria is that magical bridge—a place where your memories and ideas become beautiful, tangible books. We built it so that creating your story is an act of joy, not a challenge.
whatDrivesUs.linkText: Come and meet the dreamers behind the magic

step1.title: The Author
step1.description: Log in and let Mythoria know who you are. You'll be the proud author and owner of your unique story.

step2.title: The Story
step2.description: Easily share your story idea by writing, speaking, or even drawing on paper. Mythoria captures and transforms your concept into magic.

step3.title: The Characters
step3.description: Mythoria identifies the characters, but you can personalize every detail. Describe their appearance, passions, and unique traits.

step4.title: The Plot
step4.description: Shape your story exactly as you wish—select the graphic style, set the tone, choose your audience, and fine-tune every detail.

step5.title: The Gift
step5.description: Choose how you'd like to receive your masterpiece: as an eBook, an audiobook, or a beautifully printed book.

step6.title: Experience the Magic
step6.description: Children will be captivated seeing themselves in exciting adventures, while adults will be delighted by reliving cherished memories and sharing heartfelt moments.

community.title: Join Our Growing Community of Storytellers!

cta.title: Ready to create a story?
cta.subtitle: Sign up today and get 5 free credits to create your first personalized story!

whyChooseMythoria.title: Why Choose Mythoria?
whyChooseMythoria.subtitle: Creating your own story should feel like magic, not homework. Here's what makes Mythoria different.

youOwnTheStory.title: You Own the Story
youOwnTheStory.description: Keep all rights to your AI-generated book. Print unlimited copies, share as you please, showcase publicly only if you want.
youOwnTheStory.details: Your story, your rules—no hidden licenses, no surprise claims.

ideaToBookFast.title: From Idea to Book—Fast
ideaToBookFast.description: Write, speak, or sketch your idea and watch it transform into a fully illustrated story ready to read, listen, or print.
ideaToBookFast.details: Like hitting fast-forward on the creative montage, minus the coffee stains.

fullStoryEditing.title: Full Story Editing
fullStoryEditing.description: Tweak titles, chapters, dialogue, and pacing anytime. Invite AI to punch up scenes or rewind to earlier versions.
fullStoryEditing.details: The story stays alive—edit until it feels unmistakably yours.

multipleArtStyles.title: Multiple Art Styles
multipleArtStyles.description: Choose from cartoon, watercolor, digital art, hand-drawn, minimalist, vintage, comic book, anime, and more.
multipleArtStyles.details: Match the visuals to your vibe—serious, playful, or somewhere dreamy.

addYourOwnPhotos.title: Add Your Own Photos
addYourOwnPhotos.description: Drop in family photos, class pictures, or special moments to personalize your tale.
addYourOwnPhotos.details: Turn real memories into illustrated magic.

privateByDefault.title: Total Privacy
privateByDefault.description: Drafts stay private. Share a link with loved ones when you're ready, or opt in to the public showcase.
privateByDefault.details: No unwanted spotlights—your story, your timeline.

madeForEveryAudience.title: Made for Every Audience
madeForEveryAudience.description: Create for babies, kids, teens, or adults. Tune tone and reading level to fit your reader perfectly.

gentleCreditSystem.title: Simple Credit System
gentleCreditSystem.description: Start with 5 free credits. Top up only when you need extra chapters, illustrations, or prints.
gentleCreditSystem.details: No subscriptions, no pressure—pay as you dream.

inspirationOnTap.title: Inspiration on Tap
inspirationOnTap.description: Browse featured examples by age, art style, and language to spark your next creation.
inspirationOnTap.details: See what's possible, then make it yours.

feature1.title: 100% Personalized
feature1.description: Every story is unique and created just for you.

feature2.title: AI-Powered
feature2.description: Our artificial intelligence creates magical and engaging stories.

feature3.title: Beautiful Illustrations
feature3.description: Each story comes with stunning, custom illustrations.

feature4.title: Physical Books
feature4.description: Turn your digital story into a real book you can hold and treasure.

testimonial1.quote: My daughter absolutely loved seeing herself as the main character in her adventure. It's something she'll treasure forever!
testimonial1.author: Maria S., mother of 2

testimonial2.quote: The quality of the story and illustrations exceeded our expectations. Mythoria has created something truly special.
testimonial2.author: João P., grandfather

gallery.title: Get inspired by real books
gallery.noMore: You've seen all our sample books!
